title: anthemis pedunculata subsp. clausonis
intro: Anthemis pedunculata subsp. clausonis, also known as a sub-species of the yarrow plant, is a flowering perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. Anthemis pedunculata subsp. clausonis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
